summary.termination_detail: Time budget nearly exhausted (~1.8 minutes remaining). Best test Spearman rho achieved is 0.7453 from iteration 4 using ESM2-t30 global embeddings with a simple neural network head. Key challenge was that ESM inference on 50K test sequences was too slow for the evaluation timeout, limiting us to the simpler model. Mutation-only features (no ESM) scored poorly (0.2496) suggesting ESM embeddings are critical for this task.
